stem: On what date, and with which industry associations, did the MAS launch the Basic Financial Planning Guide?

options.A: 7 October 2023, with ABS, AFAS and LIA
options.B: 1 January 2024, with ABS and LIA only
options.C: 7 October 2023, with the SGX and CPF Board
options.D: 26 November 2010, with AFAS and the GIA

explanation: 教材 1.1 指出 MAS 于 2023 年 10 月 7 日联合新加坡银行公会(ABS)、新加坡财务顾问协会(AFAS)与人寿保险协会(LIA)推出该指南。2024 年 1 月只是定制版本上线的时间,并非推出日。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — s.1.1

stem: Under the Guide's rules of thumb, how many months' worth of expenses should be set aside for emergency needs?

options.B: At least 12 months in all cases

explanation: 教材 1.2 与第 2 节均规定应急金至少为 3 至 6 个月的开支。12 个月仅适用于收入不稳定者(如自由职业者),并非通用规则。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — s.1.2 / Emergency Funds

stem: What insurance coverage does the Guide recommend for death and total permanent disability (TPD), and for critical illness?

options.A: 4x annual income for death/TPD and 9x for critical illness
options.B: 9x annual income for death/TPD and 4x for critical illness
options.C: 10x annual income for death/TPD and 5x for critical illness

explanation: 教材第 2 节明确:身故与全残(TPD)为年收入的 9 倍,危疾为年收入的 4 倍。选项 A 将两者颠倒。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Coverage for Death, TPD and CI

stem: The Guide's 15% (protection) and 10% (investment) rules of thumb are expressed as a percentage of which income measure?

options.A: Gross annual income before any deductions
options.B: Net income after income tax only
options.C: Household income including a spouse's income
options.D: Income after deducting CPF contributions (take-home pay)

explanation: 教材指南表格脚注指出 '^After deducting CPF contributions',即以扣除 CPF 后的实得收入(take-home pay)为基数计算 15% 与 10%。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Guide table notes

stem: Why does the Guide note that the purchase of a bundled product such as a whole life policy may exceed 15% of income?

options.A: Because whole life policies are exempt from the rule of thumb
options.B: Because bundled products contain both investment and protection elements
options.C: Because MAS mandates a minimum spend of 15% on whole life
options.D: Because critical illness cover is always priced above 15%

explanation: 教材脚注 '**' 说明捆绑型产品(如终身寿险)同时含有投资与保障两种成分,因此其总成本可能超过收入的 15%。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Guide table notes

stem: According to the Guide, can a person's CPF funds be used as their emergency fund?

options.A: No, because CPF funds are tied to retirement, healthcare and home-ownership needs
options.B: Yes, CPF funds are the recommended source of emergency cash
options.C: Yes, but only the amount above the Full Retirement Sum
options.D: No, because CPF balances cannot legally exceed three months of expenses

explanation: 教材消费者 FAQ(应急金第 5 题)明确指出 CPF 资金不能用作应急金,因为其使用附有特定条件,须用于退休、医疗与置业需求。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Consumer FAQ (Emergency Funds Q5)

stem: Under the Dependants' Protection Scheme (DPS), what is the maximum coverage for a member who is still aged 60 or below?
explanation: 教材附录指出 DPS 在 60 岁前提供最高 $70,000 的一次性赔付;60 岁以上至 65 岁则降为最高 $55,000。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Appendix (DPS)

stem: Which statement about Direct Purchase Insurance (DPI) as described in the Guide is correct?

options.A: It carries the highest commission of all term products
options.B: It is only available to Full-time National Servicemen
options.C: It can only be bought through a financial adviser representative
options.D: No commission is charged because it does not come with any financial advice

explanation: 教材保障部分指出,直接购买保险(DPI)因不附带任何财务建议,故不收取佣金,是更经济的选项之一。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Coverage (affordable options)

stem: Under CareShield Life, a person is regarded as having a 'severe disability' when he is unable to perform independently at least how many of the six activities of daily living (ADLs)?
explanation: 教材 CareShield Life 部分定义:无法独立完成 6 项日常生活活动(进食、穿衣、如厕、洗澡、移位、行走)中的至少 3 项即属严重残疾。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — CareShield Life

stem: CareShield Life automatically covers which group of Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents?

options.D: Only those who opted out of ElderShield

explanation: 教材指出 CareShield Life 覆盖 1980 年及以后出生的所有新加坡公民与永久居民,保费可全额由 MediSave 支付;尚未发生严重残疾的 ElderShield 持有人可选择加入。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — CareShield Life

stem: Which of the following is NOT one of the four legacy-planning tools highlighted in the Guide?

options.C: A Trust Deed registered with MAS

explanation: 教材遗产规划部分列出四项工具:遗嘱、CPF 提名、持久授权书(LPA)与预先护理计划(ACP)。'向 MAS 注册的信托契据'并非指南所列工具。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Legacy Planning

stem: A customer's existing portfolio of insurance policies costs more than 15% of his income. Based on the Guide's consumer FAQ, what is the most appropriate first response?

options.A: Immediately demand a full refund from the insurer
options.B: Review whether the portfolio remains affordable in the long term before deciding on changes
options.C: Surrender all policies at once to fall below 15%
options.D: Report the representative to MAS for mis-selling

explanation: 教材消费者 FAQ(保障第 7 题)指出,超过 15% 不必惊慌;应先检视该组合长期是否仍可负担,再决定是否调整,并不必然意味被过度销售。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Consumer FAQ (Protection Q7)

stem: Is an FA representative in breach of MAS' requirements if he shares the Guide's recommendations with a customer before conducting the full Financial Needs Analysis (FNA)?

options.A: Yes, the full FNA must always be completed before the Guide is even mentioned
options.B: Yes, sharing the Guide constitutes a specific product recommendation
options.C: Yes, but only if the customer is an accredited investor
options.D: No, but the full FNA must still be completed before any transaction to ensure suitability

explanation: 教材行业 FAQ 指出,代表在完成完整 FNA 之前先分享指南并不违规,因为指南只是一般性建议;但任何交易完成前仍须走完完整 FNA 以确保产品适合性。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Industry FAQ (FNA Q3)

stem: What is the regulatory status of the Basic Financial Planning Guide for FA firms and their representatives?

options.A: It is not a regulatory requirement, though MAS strongly encourages adoption where appropriate
options.B: It is a mandatory requirement and non-use is an offence under the FAA
options.C: It must be shown verbatim to every customer at every meeting
options.D: It replaces the obligation to have a reasonable basis for recommendation

explanation: 教材消费者与行业 FAQ 均指出指南并非监管要求,未使用不会受罚,但 MAS 强烈鼓励 FA 公司与代表在适当情况下采纳;代表仍须遵守现行监管要求(如合理推荐基础)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.27 — Consumer FAQ Q2 / Industry FAQ
